Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Calm main graph physics; unify ego graph visuals; freeze after stabilization

Main network graph:
- gravitationalConstant: -60000 → -15000 (5x less repulsion, scales better)
- damping: 0.1 → 0.5 (5x more friction, stops bouncing)
- maxVelocity: 100 → 30 (nodes can't fly across the canvas)
- timestep: 0.5 → 0.35 (more stable simulation step)
- stabilization: 300 iters/25ms → 500 iters/100ms (fuller pre-settle)

Ego network graph:
- Replace precomputed NetworkX layout with stable_mode=True Barnes-Hut
- Same visual format as main graph (identical node/edge/color/label styling)
- Very gentle physics: gravity -8000, damping 0.8, maxVelocity 15
- 1000 stabilization iterations → fully settled before user sees it

Both graphs:
- JS injected before </body> listens for stabilizationIterationsDone and
  calls network.setOptions({physics:{enabled:false}}) to freeze the layout
  after the initial settle — no ongoing jitter, drag/zoom still work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Recover external agents from FAILED state on healthy heartbeat

External agents (joined via hive-agent) can briefly report unhealthy
during startup while their runtime initializes. The health monitor
transitions them to FAILED, but the state machine doesn't allow
FAILED -> RUNNING. This left external agents permanently stuck in
FAILED despite being fully operational.

Fix: when a healthy heartbeat arrives for a FAILED agent, remove the
stale state entry and recreate it as RUNNING. Also applied the same
recovery in the capability registration handler.

commit.message:
Add programmatic export: exportSVG, exportPNG, exportJSON

- exportSVG: headless SVG generation from DiagramDefinition, no DOM needed.
  Renders all shapes (pill, diamond, hexagon, cylinder, etc.), variants,
  groups with dashed borders, edge labels, arrowheads, and themes.
- exportPNG: renders SVG to canvas for PNG/JPEG/WebP blobs (browser only).
  Configurable scale (default 2x retina) and quality.
- exportJSON: serializes DiagramDefinition with round-trip fidelity.
- Convenience helpers: downloadSVG, downloadJSON, downloadBlob, copyToClipboard.

31 new tests covering SVG output structure, theme application,
shape rendering, XML escaping, padding, and JSON round-tripping.

commit.message:
fix(vault): strip .git suffix from derived GITHUB_REPO

The previous sed used +? (non-greedy) which is not valid in POSIX ERE.
GNU sed treated it as greedy so (.git)? never matched, leaving the .git
suffix in GITHUB_REPO. PR creation then 404'd because the GitHub API
URL became repos/owner/repo.git/pulls instead of repos/owner/repo/pulls.

Replace with two simple pipes: strip scheme+host, then strip .git suffix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: make Supabase client lazy to prevent build-time crash

createClient throws "supabaseUrl is required" when called with an empty
string, which happens during Next.js page data collection at build time
before env vars are resolved. Wrap in a Proxy so the client is only
instantiated on first actual use, not at module import time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass --http-port=9090 to cloud-sql-proxy to start health server

Without this flag, cloud-sql-proxy v2 never binds port 9090, so the
startup probe (/readyz) fails with connection refused every time.
Root cause confirmed via Cloud Run logs: proxy was running fine
(listening on 127.0.0.1:3306) but health server was never started.

Also include the stale-lock workflow step from the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove gemini from execute pool, reduce subtask timeout (diseases #17-#18)

  Caused boundary violations (modified AdminController.cs etc) and exit -1 crashes
- Execute pool now codex+claude only (was codex+gemini+claude)
- Subtask timeout 30→15 min (codex was burning full 30 min in quota wait loops)

feat(e2e): comprehensive e2e testing pipeline — 5 phases, 27 tasks (#581)

* docs(planning): e2e testing plan v1.0 — 27 tasks across 5 phases

Comprehensive end-to-end testing plan for the full MinIVess pipeline:
- Phase 0: Fix broken train→post-training→analysis seam (checkpoint_dir tags)
- Phase 1: Individual flow testing (5 models × 3 folds × 2 epochs)
- Phase 2: Integration contracts (MLflow→MinIO, Prefect API, logs, volumes)
- Phase 3: Monitoring + serving (BentoML, Grafana dashboards, Evidently, Prometheus)
- Phase 4: pytest-docker harness with `make test-e2e`

Includes user alignment Q&A (24 questions) and metalearning doc.

feat(roadmap-planner): アウトカム定義をOutput(技術指標)から顧客行動変化に転換 (#39)

テンプレート・優先順位ガイド・スキル定義・レビュー観点・evalを一貫して改善:

- templates.md: アウトカム欄を「社内顧客×行動変化×現状×計測」に再構成し、
  良い例/悪い例のガイドラインを追加。価値連鎖を矢印フォーマットから
  4列表形式(Output→社内顧客→行動変化→最終顧客価値)に変更
- prioritization-guide.md: Leverageを「波及効果(チーム数)」から
  「価値増幅度(最終顧客価値への直結度)」に、Velocityを「速度向上(時間短縮)」
  から「行動変化の深さ(新ケイパビリティ獲得度)」に再定義。
  表形式の優先順位一覧を主、quadrantChartを補助に変更
- SKILL.md: Output/Outcome/Impact区別の原則を追加、Phase 4に
  アウトカム品質チェックリスト(主語・動詞・技術指標混入)を追加
- reviewer.md: 観点5(戦略整合性)にアウトカム品質・主語・価値連鎖完全性の
  3つのレビュー項目を追加
- evals.json: Output/Outcome区別・価値連鎖整理・顧客価値ベース優先順位の
  3件のevalケースを追加
